## Editorial Checks

- [ ] Senior-first, not beginner content
- [ ] Framework-agnostic or durable beyond one framework
- [ ] Source URLs preserved
- [ ] French summaries are original, not copied excerpts
- [ ] Vendor / independent / community labels checked
- [ ] Existing URLs deduplicated
- [ ] Content-only PRs did not edit UI, architecture, package, script or workflow files

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run check:contribution-scope` if `lib/resources.ts` changed; explain any warning
